## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off strategy sprint for Monograph, focusing on growth and content marketing initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Monograph targets small architecture firms (5-50 employees) in the US, processing $10M in payments monthly](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - ["Monograph Method" emphasizes best practices: daily time tracking, monthly invoicing/collection](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [Content creation bottleneck due to limited team bandwidth; AI/GrowthX partnership to accelerate output](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=2226.0)
  - [Opportunity to leverage unique data/insights from benchmark reports and customer success stories](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=2798.0)

## Topics

### Company Context and Growth Drivers

  - [Venture-backed, aiming for multi-product expansion and end-to-end building process coverage](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1907.0)
  - [Marketing performance crucial for hitting growth goals; sales organization now predictable/scalable](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=2487.0)
  - [Current focus: increase marketing-driven SQLs from 30/month to 40-50/month by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=2520.0)

### Target Market and ICP

  - [Primary: US-based architecture firms, 5-50 employees, $500K-$5M annual billings](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
  - [Secondary: Engineering firms collaborating with architects (5-10x more logos than architects)](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=2116.0)
  - [Tertiary: Project owners/developers financing entire projects](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=2143.0)
  - [Avoid: Government, military, federal work, large universities, urban/campus planning](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)

### Product and Competitive Landscape

  - [Monograph as an "operating system" for architecture firms, emphasizing full feature adoption](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=2721.0)
  - [Main competitor: BQE (PE-owned, $30M ARR, 15% YoY growth)](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)
  - [Monograph growing 70-100% YoY, aiming for 150-200% with increased market share](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)

### Sales and Marketing Approach

  - [SDR team restructured from remote to on-site, improving performance and accountability](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=2814.0)
  - [\~140-150 total SQLs/month, with marketing contributing 30 consistently](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=2629.0)
  - [Weekly email communications to 10,000 subscribers, leveraging LinkedIn content](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=3440.0)
  - [Webinars featuring customer success stories to build trust and industry connections](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=3365.0)

### Monograph Method and Data Insights

  - [Emphasizes daily time tracking, monthly invoicing/collection for improved cash flow](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=2814.0)
  - [Benchmark report and customer testimonials showcase best practices and success metrics](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=2798.0)
  - [Opportunity to leverage unique data for content creation and thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=2798.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX team to process meeting notes and create strategy artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=3600.0)
  - [Monograph to provide access to:](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=3600.0)
      - [Benchmark report PDF](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=3600.0)
      - [Monograph Method URL](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=3600.0)
      - [Customer testimonials database](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=3600.0)
      - [Recorded webinars](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=3600.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meetings and potential in-person session in East Bay](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=3643.0)
  - [Explore AI-assisted content creation to overcome bandwidth limitations](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=3226.0)
  - [Investigate potential for new lead magnets and expanded newsletter strategy](https://fathom.video/share/yro97rbEPvVzfpNQFsAKe_heMi7n-fxs?tab=summary&timestamp=3294.0)
